## Inputs


<div class="x2mdx-ref-panel">
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-panel-head">
    <h3>ClearPartyOnboardingFlagRequest</h3>
    
  </div>
  
  
  
<dl class="x2mdx-ref-meta-grid">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-meta-item">
    <dt>Message</dt>
    <dd>com.digitalasset.canton.admin.participant.v30.ClearPartyOnboardingFlagRequest</dd>
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-meta-item">
    <dt>Client stream</dt>
    <dd>No</dd>
  </div>
  
</dl>

  
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">party_id</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The identifier of the party whose onboarding flag is being cleared. This party must already be active on the target participant. Required</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">synchronizer_id</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The identifier of the synchronizer. Required</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">begin_offset_exclusive</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">int64</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The exclusive ledger offset used as a starting point to find the party&#x27;s most recent activation on the target participant. Required</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">wait_for_activation_timeout</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">Duration</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The maximum duration the service will wait to find the topology transaction that activates the party. If not set, the service will use a default timeout. Optional</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
  
  
</div>


## Outputs


<div class="x2mdx-ref-panel">
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-panel-head">
    <h3>ClearPartyOnboardingFlagResponse</h3>
    
  </div>
  
  
  
<dl class="x2mdx-ref-meta-grid">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-meta-item">
    <dt>Message</dt>
    <dd>com.digitalasset.canton.admin.participant.v30.ClearPartyOnboardingFlagResponse</dd>
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-meta-item">
    <dt>Server stream</dt>
    <dd>No</dd>
  </div>
  
</dl>

  
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">onboarded</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">bool</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Indicates the current party onboarding status. Required</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">earliest_retry_timestamp</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">Timestamp</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The earliest time for the safe clearance of the onboarding flag. This field is only present when `onboarded` is `false`.</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
  
  
</div>

<div className="x2mdx-ref-right-rail" role="complementary" aria-label="Examples and responses">
  
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-panel">
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-code">
<div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-head">
  <span className="x2mdx-ref-rail-heading">grpcurl</span>
  
</div>

```bash grpcurl
# Add -plaintext if the server is not using TLS.
grpcurl \
  -d @ \
  <HOST:PORT> \
  com.digitalasset.canton.admin.participant.v30.PartyManagementService/ClearPartyOnboardingFlag <<'EOF'
{
  "partyId": "string",
  "synchronizerId": "string",
  "beginOffsetExclusive": "0",
  "waitForActivationTimeout": "string"
}
EOF
```
